requests.title: Dark mode toggle
requests.description: Add a light/dark theme toggle to the dashboard header

requests.title: Export dashboard to PDF
requests.description: Allow users to export the current dashboard view as a PDF report for stakeholder sharing

requests.title: Per-panel drill-down pages
requests.description: Click on any panel to navigate to a dedicated full-page view with more detail

requests.title: Multi-project support
requests.description: Allow the hub to monitor multiple Flutter projects simultaneously, with a project switcher
